headlines.headline: Wyrnor Solutions begins scheduled maintenance of cloud infrastructure systems

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy Chief Operating Officer addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: Lowering full-year guidance is a strong negative signal, indicating management expects weaker financial performance, exacerbated by softening demand.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
